case_title: DUSTIN GILER VS. MONA MOHAMED KHEIR YOUSEF SIAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF GILER, DUSTIN
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-17-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-28-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 66755915)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-17-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-15-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-28-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-15-2021 CONTINUED TO AUG-17-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
